text: Chest X-ray showed RUL lesion with pleural effusion.

PET CT showed FDG avid right lower lobe lesion with perilymphatic changes, FDG avid right lung nodules with pleural deposits and right moderate pleural effusion with right lower peritracheal, hilar, subcarinal, prevascular nodes lymphadenopathy.
Multiple lytic-slash-sclerotic lesion suggestive of skeletal metastasis.
Thoracoscopy showed irregular large-sized nodules on diaphragm and parietal pleura.
